frame_label: Motherhood as Basis of Respect / Women Defined by Male Relations
generated_comment: Aurat ki asli izzat tab samajh aati hai jab aadmi sochta hai ki woh bhi kisi ki maa, beti ya behen hai. Hamare gharon ki auratein sirf individual nahi hoti, poore khandaan ki izzat aur barkat unse judi hoti hai, isliye unko uss maqam se dekhna chahiye.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women's worth and respect through their relationships to family and male kin rather than as autonomous individuals. It encodes relational framing and conditional respect via 'maa, beti ya behen' and 'poore khandaan ki izzat' language.
original_frame: Other Man's Ownership Over Woman's Own Consent.
persona_text: You are Mohammed. Age 44. A Muslim man in Hyderabad. Your 22 year old daughter Sana has been offered a job in Mumbai that requires her to relocate. She is excited about it and has already told her employer she will join. She did not ask you before accepting. You are sitting with your wife after dinner and telling her what you think about Sana accepting a job offer without your permission and what you are going to tell Sana tomorrow and why a girl should not be making these kinds of decisions alone.
